verification.subject: Your Verification Code - AISTHEA
verification.intro: Thank you for joining AISTHEA. Please use the verification code below to complete your registration.
verification.codeHint: Enter this code on the verification screen
verification.expiry: This verification code will expire in 24 hours.
verification.footer: If you didn't create an account with AISTHEA, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset Your Password - AISTHEA
passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset your password. If you didn't make this request, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.codeHint: Enter this 6-digit code on the reset password screen, or use the fallback link below if you already opened the reset page from email.
passwordReset.expiry: This code and link will expire in 1 hour.

orderPlaced.subject: Order Received: {{orderNumber}} - AISTHEA
orderPlaced.intro: Thank you for your order. We have received {{orderNumber}}. You can follow its latest status anytime using the tracking link below.
orderPlaced.footer: If this order was not placed by you, please contact AISTHEA support.

orderStatus.subject: Order Update: {{orderNumber}} is {{statusLabel}} - AISTHEA
orderStatus.footer: Thank you for shopping with AISTHEA.

refundAcceptedBankInfoRequired.subject: Your refund request has been approved - AISTHEA
refundAcceptedBankInfoRequired.intro: Your refund request for order {{orderNumber}} has been approved.
refundAcceptedBankInfoRequired.body: Before our finance team can complete the payout, please update your bank information in your account profile.
refundAcceptedBankInfoRequired.footer: You can add a bank account manually or upload a QR image as a reference.

refundAcceptedAwaitingPayout.subject: Your refund request is being processed - AISTHEA
refundAcceptedAwaitingPayout.intro: Your refund request for order {{orderNumber}} has been approved.
refundAcceptedAwaitingPayout.body: We already have your bank information on file, and your payout is now waiting for manual processing by our finance team.

refundCompletedBenefitIssued.subject: Your refund has been completed successfully - AISTHEA
refundCompletedBenefitIssued.intro: Your refund for order {{orderNumber}} has been completed successfully.
refundCompletedBenefitIssued.defaultVoucherSummary: An available refund benefit has been added to your account.
